lines.speaker: Necrovarus
lines.text: Speak to me again and I will rend the soul from your flesh.

lines.speaker: Necrovarus
lines.text: Nobody speaks to me unless I speak to them!!!

lines.speaker: Necrovarus
lines.text: I do not answer questions, mortal fool!!

lines.speaker: Necrovarus
lines.text: I will answer questions when you are dead!!

lines.speaker: Necrovarus
lines.text: You dare to speak to me??? Have you lost your wits????

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get into the town?

sections.title: After the completion of Ghosts Ahoy

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Told you I'd defeat you, Necrovarus. My advice to you is to pass over to the next world yourself with everybody else.

lines.speaker: Necrovarus
lines.text: I should fry you for what you have done...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Quiet, evil priest!! If you try anything I will command you again, but this time it will be throw yourself into the Endless Void for the rest of eternity.

lines.speaker: Necrovarus
lines.text: Please no! I will do whatever you say!!
